items.headline: Charter’s US$7b Fiber Push Targets Growth Opportunity In Underserved Markets
items.summary: Charter Communications, NasdaqGS:CHTR, plans a US$7b expansion of its fiber broadband network. The company aims to reach 1.7 million additional underserved locations with multi gigabit speeds. The build out focuses on extending advanced broadband infrastructure to areas with limited high speed access. For you as an investor, this is a sizable infrastructure project for a large US cable and broadband provider. Charter Communications generates much of its business from broadband and related...
items.why_it_matters: News appears more supportive of sentiment or growth expectations.

items.headline: Charter Communications (CHTR) Plans to Expand Fiber Broadband Network
items.summary: Charter Communications Inc. (NASDAQ:CHTR) is one of the 12 best buy-the-dip stocks to invest in now.
